issues.description: [End of Your Turn] trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. 'Activated' is for cost-based abilities (①).

Missing second effect: the replacement/prevention ability '[Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may rest up to 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 or more other than [Pica] instead.' This is a Counter trigger, not covered by the single Rest effect.

Action 'Rest' should target the Character itself to 'set active' — clarify whether this means Rest (flip to active) or another state change. Current DSL only shows one Rest action without cost payment mechanism.
Missing cost (①) in the first effect definition. The ability has a pay cost that should be represented.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[End of Your Turn] ①: Set this Character as active.
[Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may rest up to 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 or more other than [Pica] instead.
